sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82419" key="peritrupa/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιτρῡπ-άω</orth>, <sense id="n82419.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">perforate with a circle of holes</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg009:38" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.38</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
